item.title: officialgaa: The GAA @officialgaa · 5min Despite a brave performance, manager Peter Queally felt @WaterfordGAA weren't clinical eno
officialgaa: The GAA @officialgaa · 28min Paddy Small was a key figure as @DubGAAOfficial survived a real Leinster SFC scare agains
item.description: The GAA @officialgaa · 28min Paddy Small was a key figure as @DubGAAOfficial survived a real Leinster SFC scare against Wicklow in Aughrim. The talented Ballymun Kickhams attacker scored 1-6, including the decisive late goal. Has his performance earned your vote? 2 1 mil

item.title: officialgaa: The GAA @officialgaa · 29min The experienced Dessie Ward continues to impress for @monaghangaa , who overcame neighbour
item.description: The GAA @officialgaa · 29min The experienced Dessie Ward continues to impress for @monaghangaa , who overcame neighbours Cavan in the Ulster SFC. Ward drove forward to supply 0-4, including one 2 pointer for Gabriel Bannigan's outfit. Is he your pick for POTW? Vote now via our Instagram stories 1 mil

item.title: officialgaa: The GAA @officialgaa · 29min Despite being forced off injured in the closing stages, Luke Loughlin had already delivered
item.description: The GAA @officialgaa · 29min Despite being forced off injured in the closing stages, Luke Loughlin had already delivered a typically stylish display for @westmeath_gaa , who surprised Meath in the Leinster SFC. The Downs clubman contributed 6 points for Mark McHugh's improving team. Does he get your shout for Mostrar más 1 mil

item.title:
SmallerFishGAA: Smaller Fish @SmallerFishGAA · 43min Great stuff from @chrisocfl
I was at the game so didn't hear Tommy Walsh say
item.description:
Smaller Fish @SmallerFishGAA · 43min Great stuff from @chrisocfl
I was at the game so didn't hear Tommy Walsh say
“Limerick have the Bull but Galway have the Rabbit”
Cita Irish Examiner Sport @ExaminerSport · 1h Christy O'Connor: Clare set new record and Offaly taste rock-and-roll days
